title: senecio helenitis subsp. pyrenaicus
intro: Senecio helenitis subsp. pyrenaicus, also known as Pyrenean groundsel, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its bitter and astringent compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio helenitis subsp. pyrenaicus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are commonly made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
